subcodes.first_line: We have, with the hand of might, imbibed the pure wine that was sealed in the eternal realms of pre-existence, and when We broke its seal, its fragrance was diffused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اخذنا الرحیق بید الاقتدار الذی کان مختوما فی ازل الازال فلما فککنا ختمه تضوع عرف
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
